login.title: Administrative Access
login.subtitle: Sign in to review submissions and protect the archive with care.
login.inlineErrorTitle: We could not sign you in
login.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
login.genericError: Sign in failed. Please try again.
login.recoveryHint: If this keeps happening, verify your credentials or contact an administrator.

route.accessDeniedMessage: Your account is active, but it does not have administrator permissions.
route.accessDeniedHint: Ask an existing admin to grant your role, or return to the public archive.
